# Contributing to Blueprints

This repository is a personal collection of project templates maintained for my own use.
Feedback is welcome, but please keep a few things in mind before getting involved.

## How to Get Help

Many issues created on open source projects turn out to be usage questions or general
discussions rather than bugs or feature requests. These don't need to be tracked as
GitHub issues. I wrote documentation for a reason. Go read it.

* [Official documentation](https://scottoffen.github.io/blueprints)
* [GitHub community discussions](https://github.com/scottoffen/blueprints/discussions)

**Issues created solely to ask usage questions will be closed.**

## Issues

Issues are for things that can be **fixed, added, resolved, or implemented.** Feature
requests that don't align with my own needs are unlikely to be implemented.
**Do not open an issue for a feature request without first opening a discussion.**

## Pull Requests

Pull requests are not expected and may be closed without review. If you have an idea
you'd like to contribute, open a discussion first.
